name: Quick White Banana Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 ounces Duncan Hines Moist Deluxe White Cake Mix
7 1/4 ounces Betty Crocker Fluffy White Frosting Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 12-cup Bundt pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine mashed bananas, cake mix, pudding, egg whites, sour cream, water, oil, and baking powder. Mix just until moistened.
4. Turn batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 50 minutes.
6. To prepare frosting, follow directions on box.
7. Spread over cooled cake.
